note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right heel wound site, rates 8/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right heel measures 3.9 cm x 3.6 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 51% slough, 49% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Stage 3 pressure ulcer Right heel — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Debridement consult ordered.
